modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to access Coyote Connections due to authentication errors

full_description_text:  
User tried to log in to Coyote Connections.  
They got an error saying page not found.  
Another message said their account was not found.  
User needs help with their username issue.
short_description: Unable to access Coyote Connections due to authentication errors
description:
